prompt:
Scene:
A square space-opera rebellion poster with midnight blue, engine white, rust red, and amber flare colors, finished like a collector's one-sheet with luminous ink and subtle paper grain. The composition should rise from a grounded lower strip of machinery and troops to an open heroic sky, maintaining strong diagonal movement and clean negative space for campaign elements. Let smoke, sparks, and star haze create drama without obscuring the structure.

Subject:
Remix the grammar of a legendary uprising poster into a new cast of original characters. The central hero is a young signal engineer lifting a radiant antenna staff toward the sky. Behind and around the hero, arrange a silver-haired star smuggler, a broad-shouldered android defector, a masked pilot with a cracked visor, and a grandmother tactician gripping folded battle maps. Near the bottom, show a narrow line of insurgent bikes and a grounded shuttle bursting through smoke. Above them, place two colossal moons and the silhouette of a floating citadel, with one bright diagonal beam connecting the raised staff to the upper sky.

Important details:
The poster must preserve the instantly readable uprising hierarchy of one raised heroic gesture, ranked companions, vehicle strip at the bottom, and celestial backdrop above. Use deliberate campaign spacing so the eye travels from the staff to the cast to the lower action band. Replace title, cast names, and studio marks with abstract illuminated panels, embossed metal plates, or painted blocks that suggest ad layout without resolving into words. The image should feel like a sincere blockbuster key art remix, not satire, with an entirely original cast inhabiting the composition of an unforgettable rebellion poster.

Use case:
Iconic Poster Cast Remix single study 9/9, testing whether a classic uprising-poster silhouette can stay recognizable after the cast, props, and world mythology are completely rebuilt.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no lightsabers, no stormtrooper analogs, no copied spaceship designs from known franchises, no overcrowded dogfight sky, no comic-book exaggeration, no letters hidden in smoke or moon glow.
title: Rebel Skyline Uprising
description: A space-opera uprising poster remix with a raised signal staff, ranked companions, and a vehicle strip beneath twin moons.

generation.runner_notes: Independent poster-remix study with a space-uprising hierarchy and no reference dependency.

en.title: Rebel Skyline Uprising
en.description: A space-opera uprising poster remix with a raised signal staff, ranked companions, and a vehicle strip beneath twin moons.

zh-CN.title: 天际反叛起义
zh-CN.description: 太空反叛海报换角研究，以举起的信号权杖、分层同伴和双月下的载具带为核心。

alt.en: A space rebellion poster remix with a raised staff, companion portraits, and small vehicles along the bottom.
alt.zh-CN: 一张太空起义海报换角图，主角高举权杖，周围是同伴肖像，下方有小型载具带。
